name: SAIL Codebook
purpose: Companion semantic map for SAIL .sail JSON files. Use this with sail.schema.json so humans and AI agents can interpret numeric enum values without guessing.
canonicalModelNote: The .sail JSON model does not need to change. This codebook explains values already present in the canonical model.

0.name: BoundaryParticipant
0.description: External participant outside the system boundary; may be a person, external system, device, or other outside actor.

1.name: System
1.description: Deployable or independently accountable system boundary.

2.name: Datastore
2.description: Persistence, buffering, state, queue, bus, storage, or other data-holding component.

3.name: ServiceUnit
3.description: Leaf-level unit of responsibility where SAIL stops modeling internals.

2.name: Process
2.description: A process interaction described by process steps and flow.

0.name: StructuralContext
0.description: Black-box structural boundary view: one subject system plus boundary participants and relationships.

1.name: StructuralHierarchical
1.description: Structural decomposition view showing internal systems, service units, datastores, and communication pathways.

2.name: BehavioralContext
2.description: Behavioral boundary/context view showing actors and high-level interactions.

3.name: BehavioralInteraction
3.description: Behavioral interaction view showing scenario participants and interaction relationships.

4.name: BehavioralProcess
4.description: Behavioral process view showing ordered process steps, decisions, start/end, and responsible elements.

5.name: IntrinsicCharacteristicMap
5.description: Intrinsic view showing characteristics, constraints, goals, risks, and quality attributes.

6.name: Interface
6.description: Interface definition view showing interface operations and contracts.

DiagramElementEdge.sourceEnum: public enum DiagramElementEdge { None, Top, Bottom, Left, Right }

1.name: Top
1.description: Connector attaches to the top edge of the diagram element.

2.name: Bottom
2.description: Connector attaches to the bottom edge of the diagram element.

3.name: Left
3.description: Connector attaches to the left edge of the diagram element.

4.name: Right
4.description: Connector attaches to the right edge of the diagram element.

OperationType.description: Operation type is stored as a string in the observed .sail files, not as a numeric enum.

aiAgentRules: Use sail.schema.json to validate document structure.
Use this codebook to interpret numeric values.
Do not infer the meaning of a numeric enum not listed here.
Resolve diagram IDs back to Inventory before making implementation decisions.
Treat CommunicationPathways and Interfaces as contract/boundary context.
Treat CharacteristicMaps as constraints, quality attributes, and architectural pressure.
Report architecture conflicts instead of silently bypassing defined boundaries or interfaces.
